zh.lifeSummary: 當David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl於1245年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，他的父親John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl28歲，母親Ada Hastings26歲。他於大約1264年與Isabelle De Dover of Chilham結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1270年登記服兵役。他去世於1270年8月6日在突尼西亞تونس卡薩享年25歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl于1245年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，他的父亲John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl28岁，母亲Ada Hastings26岁。他于大约1264年与Isabelle De Dover of Chilham结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1270年登记服兵役。他去世于1270年8月6日在突尼西亚تونس卡薩享年25岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl was born in 1245, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl, was 28 and his mother, Ada Hastings, was 26. He married Isabelle De Dover of Chilham about 1264. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1270. He died on 6 August 1270, in Carthage, Tunis, Tunisia, at the age of 25, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl est né en 1245, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ada Hastings, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle De Dover of Chilham environ 1264. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1270. Il est décédé le 6 août 1270, à Carthage, Tunis, Tunisie, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl 1245 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl 28 und seine Mutter Ada Hastings 26. Er hat um 1264 Isabelle De Dover of Chilham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1270 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 6. August 1270 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Carthage, Tunis, Tunesien und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl è nato il nel 1245 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Ada Hastings, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle De Dover of Chilham circa 1264. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1270. Morì il 6 agosto 1270, nel Carthage, Tunis, Tunisia, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Athollが1245年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父John de Strathbogie Earl Of Athollは28歳，母Ada Hastingsは26歳であった。約1264年にIsabelle De Dover of Chilhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年に兵役登録をした。彼は1270年8月6日にチュニジアتونسカーサッジで25歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl(이)가 1245년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada Hastings(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1264년 Isabelle De Dover of Chilham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1270년 8월 6일 튀니지 تونس 카스아지에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl nasceu em 1245, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ada Hastings, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle De Dover of Chilham aproximadamente 1264. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1270. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1270, em Carthage, Tunis, Tunísia, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl родился в 1245 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada Hastings, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle De Dover of Chilham около 1264 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1270 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 6 августа 1270 г. в местности картадж, تونس, Тунис в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

sm.1270-1271: mai le 1270 e o'o I le 1271

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl nació en 1245, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Strathbogie Earl Of Atholl, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Ada Hastings, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Isabelle De Dover of Chilham aproximadamente 1264. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1270. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1270, en Carthage, Tunis, Túnez, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
